howItWorks.title: How it works?
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to your best dating profile ever.

step1.title: Select a Style
step1.desc: Choose from dozens of premium styles, from rooftop bars to sunset beaches.

step2.title: Upload Photos
step2.desc: Upload 4-10 photos of yourself. Regular selfies are perfectly fine.

step3.title: Get Results
step3.desc: Our AI works its magic and delivers your stunning new photos in minutes.

photoGrid.subtitle: Our AI generates photos that look completely natural. No more awkward selfies or blurry shots.

features.title: Why you 'll love us?
features.subtitle: The world's most advanced AI engine specifically trained for dating profile success.

f1.title: Ultra-Realistic Quality
f1.desc: Our advanced AI models generate photos that look exactly like you, just in better settings with perfect lighting.

f2.title: Lightning Fast
f2.desc: Get your professional photos in under 5 minutes. No more waiting days for a photographer to edit.

f3.title: Affordable Pricing
f3.desc: Get dozens of photos for a fraction of the cost of a traditional professional photo shoot.

f4.title: Privacy First
f4.desc: Your photos are encrypted and automatically deleted from our servers after 24 hours.

f5.title: Match Guarantee
f5.desc: Join thousands of users who have tripled their matches on Tinder, Bumble, and Hinge.

f6.title: App Optimized
f6.desc: Images are generated in 4:5 aspect ratio, optimized for all major dating platforms.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How many photos do I need to upload?
faq.a1: For the best results, we recommend uploading 4 to 10 photos of yourself. Regular selfies with clear lighting work perfectly.
faq.q2: How long does it take to get my AI photos?
faq.a2: Our advanced AI models typically generate your high-quality professional photos in under 15 minutes.
faq.a3: Yes, absolutely. We prioritize your privacy. All uploaded and generated photos are automatically deleted from our secure servers within 24 hours.
faq.q4: Can I use these photos for LinkedIn?
faq.a4: Yes! While our primary styles are optimized for dating profiles, we also offer corporate and casual styles that are perfect for LinkedIn and professional use.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question about features, pricing, or anything else, our team is ready to answer all your questions.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p: Welcome to Facevia. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you about how we look after your personal data when you visit our website and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

s2.title: 2. The Data We Collect About You
s2.p: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together as follows:
s2.l1: Identity Data: includes first name, last name.
s2.l3: Image Data: includes the photos you upload to our service to generate AI avatars.
s2.l4: Technical Data: includes IP address, login data, browser type.

s3.title: 3. Data Security & Image Retention
s3.p: We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost. All uploaded photos and generated images are automatically deleted from our servers 24 hours after your generation is complete.

s1.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
s1.p: By accessing or using Facevia, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.

s2.title: 2. Use License
s2.p1: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on Facevia's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.
s2.p2: This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
s2.l2: use the materials for any commercial purpose, or for any public display (commercial or non-commercial);
s2.l3: attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software contained on Facevia's website;
s2.l4: remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials; or
s2.l5: transfer the materials to another person or "mirror" the materials on any other server.

s3.title: 3. Disclaimer
s3.p: The materials on Facevia's website are provided on an 'as is' basis. Facevia makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.

s1.title: 1. What Are Cookies
s1.p: As is common practice with almost all professional websites, this site uses cookies, which are tiny files that are downloaded to your computer, to improve your experience. This page describes what information they gather, how we use it and why we sometimes need to store these cookies.

s2.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
s2.p: We use cookies for a variety of reasons detailed below. Unfortunately, in most cases, there are no industry standard options for disabling cookies without completely disabling the functionality and features they add to this site.

s3.title: 3. The Cookies We Set
s3.l1: Account related cookies: If you create an account with us then we will use cookies for the management of the signup process and general administration.
s3.l2: Login related cookies: We use cookies when you are logged in so that we can remember this fact.
s3.l3: Site preferences cookies: In order to provide you with a great experience on this site, we provide the functionality to set your preferences, such as your selected language.
